description: Neutral, user-overridable LTE band-selection presets. Point CMW_BAND_PRESETS_FILE at a copy of this file to customise. These are selection convenience sets only; the standard RF facts (EARFCN tables, band edges) live in code.

frequency_coverage_set.description: One band per distinct frequency region for broad coverage with fewer sweeps.

low_band_set.description: Sub-1 GHz bands (coex-sensitive, near sub-GHz ISM/HaLow).

operator_sensitivity_set.description: Example operator-defined subset with tight receiver-sensitivity requirements. Replace with your own bands.
